prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DLX-NAILTOOLSET-3PC-AMZ Product Type: COSMETIC_NAIL_SET Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Professional Manicure Pedicure Nail Art Tool Set Beauty Tools 3 Pieces Description: Whether you plan to use this manicure or pedicure toolset is at home, or in a professional nail salon, prepping the nail base with these essential tools will make all the difference at the end of any nail treatment. The manicure pedicure toolset includes nail clippers, a cuticle trimmer and lastly, a cuticle remover and shaper fork; these tools will to ensure natural nails are at their best before receiving nail polish, gel nail polish, nail art or acrylic nails, prolonging the longevity of any nail treatment.

As mentioned above, the three-piece manicure pedicure toolset for nail art comes with three important tools:

NAIL CLIPPERS: Nail clippers are the first place to start with a manicure or pedicure to ensure nails are cut to yours or a client's desired nail length; the nail clipper features curved blades in order to better follow your nail shape for easy and accurate clipping

CUTICLE TRIMMERS: A cuticle trimmer is an absolutely essential tool to have for a manicure or pedicure, as it helps to shape the nails base and prep it before nail polish, gel polish, nail art or acrylic nails are applied; the cuticle trimmer is essential for trimming back overgrown cuticles and removing dead skin around the nails

CUTICLE REMOVER & SHAPER FORK: This cuticle remover or cuticle pusher is great for trimming, pushing and shaping cuticles in conjunction with the cuticle trimmer; the blade can also scrape leftover residue on nails from gel polish or glue left behind from acrylic nails which must be removed before applying a new treatment

If you’re thinking of giving yourself a manicure at home, or a trained nail technician or cosmetologist who just needs a fresh set of essential, basic manicure pedicure tools to use at work, look no further than this economical, functional, three-piece Professional Manicure Pedicure Nail Art Tool Set! These easy to handle tools will ensure any manicure or pedicure nail treatment lasts longer and stands up to everyday wear-and-tear, allowing you to prep the nail base for intricate nail art, a simple nail polish application or for artificial or acrylic nails. Search Terms: manicure set manicure tools pedicure set pedicure tools nail art nail care skin care beauty tools nail clippers nail trimmers cuticle cutters cuticle trimmers bathroom vanity nail buffer block emery board pedicure supplies manicure supplies Features: - MANICURE PEDICURE TOOLS SET: A professional set of three manicure pedicure tools, your set includes nail clippers, a cuticle trimmer and a cuticle remover fork; all are essential tools in carrying out a proper manicure or pedicure to ensure the nail base is ready for nail polish, nail art, gel nail polish or acrylic nail applications - NAIL CLIPPERS: A cuticle trimmer is an absolutely essential tool to have for a manicure or pedicure, as it helps to shape the nails base and prep it before nail polish, gel polish, nail art or acrylic nails are applied; the cuticle trimmer is essential for trimming back overgrown cuticles and removing dead skin around the nails - CUTICLE TRIMMER: A cuticle trimmer is an absolutely essential tool to have for a manicure or pedicure as it gently trims away at overgrown cuticles allowing the nail bed and nail base to breathe and most importantly, preps and shapes the nail bed before applying nail polish, nail art or acrylic nails - CUTICLE REMOVER FORK: This cuticle remover or cuticle pusher is great for trimming, pushing and shaping cuticles; the blade can also scrape leftover residue on nails from gel polish or glue left behind from acrylic nails - SPECIFICATIONS: Suitable for home or salon use; Country of Origin: China; Tool kit sold as a set of three that includes nail clippers, cuticle remover fork and cuticle trimmer; Material: Stainless Steel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
